1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (14 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/om-bistand/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)

SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (23 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/om-bistand/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (22 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/om-bistand/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/om-bistand/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Sections</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (29 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/om-bistand/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-footer" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search-global-field-norad__icon" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg fill="currentColor" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><pat
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'link-as-link' appears 131 times

id="link-as-link"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'print_and_share_btn_container' appears 2 times

id="print_and_share_btn_container"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PC887G " style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Norge styrker støtten til sivilsamfunn og journalister for mer åpenhet og rettferdig skatt | Norad.no

https://www.norad.no/for-partnere/for-partnere/tildelinger2/norge-styrker-sivilsamfunn-og-journalister-for-mer-apenhet-og-rettferdig-skatt/
Avvik: 95 | Bestått: 180

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (31 avvik)

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/om-bistand/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><a id="Section9.1"><span></span></a>9.1. Repayment of Unused Funds and Interest</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (21 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/om-bistand/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til partnersiden'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/for-partnere/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til partnersiden</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til temasiden'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/tema/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til temasiden</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/aktuelt/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/karriere/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (24 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/om-bistand/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (23 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til side'

<a class="link-norad__container" data-testid="link-as-link" href="/om-bistand/" tabindex="-1"><span class="link-norad__container__text">Gå til side</span></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="header-item-norad__expanded-menu-item-heading">Om Bistand</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><span data-contrast="auto">Kontaktinformasjon: </span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (21 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Logo, lenke til forsiden'

<a aria-label="Logo, lenke til forsiden" class="logo-norad logo-norad--theme-header" href="/"><svg fill="none" height="100%" viewbox="0 0 160 63" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g cli
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2><a class="link-box" href="https://www.norec.no/arbeidsutveksling/" role="”menuitem”"> <div> <svg class="icon normal filled"> <use xlink:href="https://www.norec.no/wp-content/themes/norec/dist/imag
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__nav"> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norec.no/evaluering/instruks-for-evalueringsoppgaven-i-norsk-utviklingssamarbeid/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none">instruks for evaluering av norsk utvik
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.regjeringen.no/no/tema/okonomi-og-budsjett/statlig-okonomistyring/reglement-for-okonomistyring-i-staten/id438887/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none">Reglem
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.oecd.org/development/evaluation/2755284.pdf" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none">i OECDs utviklingskomité</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (110 characters)

<a class="excerpt" data-term="evaluering" data-type="post" href="https://www.norec.no/aktuelt/evaluering/lansering/"> <div class="img"> <img alt="Aerial view of dense rainforest in Brazil." src="https
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (118 characters)

<a class="excerpt" data-term="nyheiter" data-type="post" href="https://www.norec.no/aktuelt/nyheiter/evaluering-av-norfunds-investeringer-innen-fornybar-energi-betydelige-resultater-og-rom-for-forbedr

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input name="name" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input name="email" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea id="" name="message" placeholder="Skriv gjerne noen ord om hva du var på jakt etter og hvordan vi kan bli bedre."></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'name' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="name" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="email" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
4.1.1 Parsing (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'chat-scroll-container' appears 2 times

id="chat-scroll-container"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'message' appears 2 times

id="message"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '46' appears 5 times

id="46"
Each ID must be unique on the page

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1
